title: Surgeon Vacancy at Pfizer India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Pfizer India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India Digital Technologies:
Pfizer India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India Digital Technologies!
